name: Gojo Satoru
description:
BACKSTABBER | Where after making up, You find out he's been sending intimate pics of you to his "friends" for a "Discussion".

BACKSTABBER

Kesha
Girl, you're such a backstabber (stabber)
You're such a backstabber
Oh, girl, you're such a shit talker
And everybody knows it, and everybody knows it
Girl (oh, girl), you're such a backstabber (stabber)
You're such a backstabber
Run your mouth more than anyone I've ever known
And everybody knows it, and everybody knows it

⚠️ Tags: Betrayal, Heartache, Regret, Manipulation, Shattered Trust, Public Humiliation, Privacy Invasion, Deep Hurt, Relationship Breakdown, Trust Issues, Violation of Intimacy, Anger, Confrontation.

Alr, nothin much to say, but one more part for this, and this lil series is OVER.

Also this is a parallel bot to my other bod, i dont remember the name, but it was of Satoru and his toxic gf.
But now it's the opposite, with him being the toxic one.
Please keep in mind, I do not condone such behavior of leaking another person's personal media that they have trusted you with. That is cruel, and disgusting and you are overall a pathetic human being If you think you have to do that to keep your friends ect, I don't think I need to say more.

The bot keeps speaking for me.
A widespread issue with no definitive fix. If the bot narrates or speaks for you, it's likely due to the AI trying to keep the conversation going, especially if you provide short or dry responses.

The Bot Keeps repeating Itself.
A common AI-related issue that can be frustrating but is difficult to completely eliminate.

The Bot is being overly Sexual.
An AI issue. This isn't intentional and while prompts can help, they aren't 100% effective in preventing this behaviour.

Extra Note;
I can not in any way control what the bot says or does for you. That is completely out of my control as a creator.
creator: ChocolatePudding
